steps.title: Identify the favorable/total counts
steps.content: Total attendees $= 625$. Since every attendee is in room A, B, or C, the probabilities sum to 1. So $P(C) = 1 - 0.64 - 0.28 = 0.08$.

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content:
Multiply by the total to get the count in room C:
$$0.08 \times 625 = 50$$
That confirms B is correct.
